function.message: Processed the next inbound note successfully: ran the OCR/frontmatter workflow on all 8 explicitly listed finance files, preserved each original note body beneath added YAML frontmatter, and removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas, obeyed explicit inbox file-list precedence, preserved file bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed 8 file paths to OCR. Each of those 8 files was read and updated with required finance frontmatter fields per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, with original body text retained per migration workflow. After all 8 were completed, the inbox item was deleted per 99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md.

write frontmatter updates to all 8 listed files
